mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate applied to equity cash flows, mechanically lifting present values and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals impending corporate earnings contraction, triggering risk-off repricing and negative S&P 500 forward returns once the threshold is breached.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold breach, or the signal shows no predictive power in post-2000 data.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between housing construction activity and industrial production captures supply-demand imbalances; when housing starts surge while industrial output stagnates, inventory buildups compress profit margins and drive negative equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term (HOUST growth minus INDPRO growth) shows a Rank IC below 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window, or equity returns do not decline when the divergence widens.

mechanism_narrative: During active rate-hiking cycles, rising short-term rates outpace inflation expectations, increasing real borrowing costs and compressing equity valuations over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns remain positive or neutral when the Fed funds rate rises above 2.5% while CPI remains below 2.5%, or the signal fails to predict drawdowns in 2015-2018 data.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding consumer credit balances reflect strong household liquidity and spending momentum, which translates directly into higher corporate revenues and positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no positive correlation with RSAFS growth, or the signal generates negative IC in >50% of rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A breakdown in industrial production below its long-term trend indicates supply-side bottlenecks or demand collapse, forcing equity multiples to contract and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive when INDPRO drops below the threshold, or the threshold breach fails to precede equity drawdowns by at least 10 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll growth deceleration and unemployment rate acceleration confirm a labor market inflection, signaling peak corporate earnings and triggering negative equity returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative 60-day returns in >40% of historical instances, or the interaction term shows no statistical significance in a rolling regression.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-growth environment, accelerating real GDP growth combined with rising housing permits amplifies earnings revision momentum, driving positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns decline when both GDP and housing starts accelerate, or the combined signal shows a Rank IC below 0.02 over a 2-year window.
